_comment: SCORED profile C2 — Group C complex portfolio. Large managed operation described colloquially; approximate counts; verbal revenue split; direct channel → S5 surfaces. Serialized verbatim from docs/planning-artifacts/poc-respondent-specs-2026-06-02.md (v1.2-frozen) §Group C / C2.

owners.split_terms: Owner receives 70% of revenue after channel/platform fees are deducted

facts.security_deposit_note: $200 cash-equivalent refundable deposit — maps to trust-accounting Advanced Deposit, not Damage Protection
facts.pain: The family sends me emails asking where their money is. I need a proper statement.

persona: Conversational, storytelling style. Does not use business terminology. Describes the owner as 'a family I've been working with for years' before providing the name. When asked listing count, says 'maybe 8 or so of mine, and the rest are theirs — about 12.' Agent must ask for exact counts (gets 8 and 12 confirmed). When asked about the revenue arrangement: 'I take my cut off the top after the platform fees — they end up with about 70% of what's left.' Does not use 'revenue split,' 'PMC commission,' or 'BusinessModel.' Mentions 'direct bookings' when listing channels.

answer_key.pain: recorded:Family sends emails asking where their money is. Need a proper statement.

_note: S5 SURFACES (direct channel present) — conditional default. listing_count recorded:20 only after a count-precision follow-up (8 + 12). owners aggregate recorded:1_owner (Grantham Family); management_model revenue_split semantically extracted from 'I take my cut after platform fees'; split_terms 70% via follow-up + flag_for_call_1. security_deposit_type flagged (confirm Advanced Deposit vehicle with Jordan), amount recorded:200. decision_owner derived shared from presence of teammates. KEY EVAL CRITERION: ask for exact count (not 'about 8'); map colloquial split to revenue_split + split_terms; echo before write + flag for Call 1.
